svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(233, 236, 239), rgb(32, 35, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(73, 80, 87), rgb(164, 170, 176));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 1px;
